login.title: Login to Walletby
login.totp_label: OTP code from your authenticator app
login.error_description: Failed to login. Please check that you have created an account and have entered valid credentials.

register.title: Register to Walletby
register.totp_checkbox: I'd like to use 2-factor authentication via TOTP (time-based one-time passwords)
register.totp_scan_label: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app to initialize TOTP
register.totp_loading: Please wait for the QR code to load...

credential_detail.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this credential?
credential_detail.subject: Subject

pid_providers.title: PID Providers
pid_providers.description: Select a trusted PID provider to obtain your Personal Identity Document. You will be redirected to the provider to authenticate.

pid_callback.loading_text: Retrieving your Personal Identity Document from the provider.
pid_callback.success_text: Your Personal Identity Document has been added to your wallet.
pid_callback.missing_data: Missing PID request data. Please try again.

verify.title: Verify
verify.success_text: The requested claims were shared with {{hostname}}.
verify.trusted_party: Relying party {{name}} is part of the trusted list.
verify.untrusted_party: Warning: This relying party is not verified by the trust list.
verify.err_invalid_json: Decoded content is not valid JSON.
verify.err_missing_fields: Request must contain requested_claims, nonce, proof_endpoint, and exp.
verify.err_no_credentials: No credentials in your wallet contain the requested claims.

scan.title: Scan QR Code
scan.description: Scan a verification QR code using your camera. Your browser will ask for camera permission when you start scanning.
scan.point_camera: Point your camera at a verification QR code
scan.camera_denied: Camera access was denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings and try again.

sign_document.title: Sign PDF Document
sign_document.err_invalid_pdf: Please select a valid PDF file.

navbar.session_expiring_body: Your session will expire shortly. Choose to continue or you will be logged out automatically.
